heading: Retention of papers of American vessels until payment of demands and wages
label: 4205 Retention of papers of American vessels until payment of demands and wages
text: All consular officers are authorized and required to retain in their possession all the papers of vessels of the United States, which shall be deposited with them as directed by law, till payment shall be made of all demands and wages on account of such vessels.
